name: Smooth-as-Silk Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over water in a saucepan and allow to soften for 5 minutes.
2. Bring to a boil. Add the brown sugar replacement and stir to dissolve.
3. Remove from heat and cool to the consistency of thin syrup.
4. Beat constantly, pour the syrup in a thin stream into the beaten egg whites.
5. Beat in vanilla. Yield: Frosts sides and tops of any size cake.
6. Food Exchange per serving: NEGLIGIBLE
Source: The Diabetic Chocolate Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand.
